div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, November 6, 1937—noon.
[Received November 6—11:57 a.m.]

div.p:
141. BoucasValentim Bouças, member of the Brazilian Federal Foreign Trade Council and Special Technical Adviser to the Minister for Finance. informs me that on account of the present confused situation caused by the decision of the Government to alter its coffee policy the Minister of FinanceArthur de Souza Costa. is considering recommending a suspension of service on certain foreign debts. He asserted, however,
that both the Minister of Finance and himself are determined to protect the dollar bonds in accordance with the conversations held in Washington.
